name: SBI Card MILES ELITE
milestoneBenefits: 1 additional domestic airport lounge access on every Rs 1 lakh spend, capped at 15 additional visits per year
20,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 12 lakh
Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 15 lakh
additionalBenefits: 5,000 Travel Credits on spending Rs 1 lakh within 60 days of card issuance after joining fee payment
6 Travel Credits per Rs 200 spent on travel
2 Travel Credits per Rs 200 spent on all other eligible purchases
1 Travel Credit worth up to Rs 1 for air mile or hotel point conversion
1 Travel Credit worth Rs 0.50 for travel bookings
1 Travel Credit worth Rs 0.25 for Shop & Smile catalogue products
8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for first 2 membership years with 6 international lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
Flight cancellation cover up to 6 times per year at Rs 3,500 each
Air accident cover up to Rs 1 crore
Lost card liability cover up to Rs 1 lakh
Loss of travel documents cover up to Rs 12,500
Loss of checked-in baggage cover up to Rs 72,000
Delay of checked-in baggage cover of Rs 7,500
Baggage damage cover up to Rs 5,000
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 500 per month on fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000
